# Share of electricity generated by nuclear power, by country

- **File:** `share-electricity-nuclear.csv`
- **Powers:** choropleth map — *"Some countries are leaning into nuclear, others wait"*
- **Source:** [Our World in Data](https://ourworldindata.org/grapher/share-electricity-nuclear)
- **Citation:** Ember (2026); Energy Institute – Statistical Review of World Energy (2025) – with major processing by Our World in Data.
- **Coverage:** All countries, 1985–2025, annual. Value is a percentage of total electricity generated.
- **Retrieved:** 28 May 2026.

## Columns
| Column | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Entity` | Country name. |
| `Code` | ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code. |
| `Year` | Calendar year. |
| `Nuclear` | Share of electricity from nuclear power (%). |
| `Nuclear (Original Year)` | Provenance: the year a value actually came from when gap-filled with tolerance. |
